description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a Victorian-inspired facade, featuring ornate gable trim and a prominent front porch supported by white columns. The exterior is clad in light blue horizontal siding with white trim, and the roof is a combination of gable and shed styles, covered in dark shingles. Two red brick chimneys rise from the roof, adding to the classic appearance. The front porch is enclosed with a decorative railing and leads up to a set of steps and a recessed entryway. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the sides, with a distinctive arched window above the porch. The house sits on a red brick foundation, and the overall design suggests a historic urban neighborhood setting.
description: A two-story Victorian-style house with blue siding, ornate gable trim, a front porch, and red brick chimneys. The house features symmetrical windows and a decorative entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate gable, enclosed porch, main entry steps, and decorative trim.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the long expanse of blue siding, symmetrical window rows, and two brick chimneys.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back porch area, upper and lower balconies, and simple window arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with similar window arrangement and siding as the other side, plus a clear view of the roof slope.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with steps, covered front porch, white columns, and decorative gable trim
